close_reason: Implemented goparse, buckgen libraries and CLI; integrated into Nix; removed gobuckify and patches
description:
Create src/cmd/buckgen/ CLI that generates BUCK files for Go vendor directories.

## Goals
- Drop-in replacement for gobuckify in Nix builds
- Read gobuckify.json config format (backward compatible)
- Scan vendor/ directory and generate rules.star files
- No scaffolding required (no go.mod, main.go, vendor/modules.txt)

## Structure
```
src/cmd/buckgen/
├── main.go         # CLI entry point
└── config.go       # Config loading (gobuckify.json compatible)
```

## Usage
```bash
buckgen /path/to/godeps-cell
# Reads gobuckify.json, scans vendor/, writes rules.star files
```

## Nix Integration
- Add to nix/packages/buckgen.nix
- Wire into flake outputs
title: buckgen CLI: Command-line tool
